title: State of the Feed — Week of June 15–21, 2026
content_html:
This week the aggregator completed 31 runs, retrieving an average of 960 articles per run with 35 quality articles selected per run on average. The news category dominated ingestion at 814 articles, followed by ai-tech and wellness each at 78 articles. Climate, local, and science categories contributed 28, 27, and 26 articles respectively, with homelab at 19 and scifi at 13 articles.

Two feeds were added this week: Animikii News River and OpenMedia. Feed health monitoring identified errors across five feeds: OpenMedia, BC Forestry Tech and Silviculture (Kagi), Precision Agriculture and AgTech (Kagi), National Indigenous Innovation (Kagi), and Kagi Summarizer. No feed discovery report was generated for the week.
